steps.title: Convert percentage decrease to multiplier and identify time period
steps.content:
A 3.5% decrease per year means the population is multiplied by $(1 - 0.035) = 0.965$ each year.

From 2005 to 2015: $2015 - 2005 = 10$ years.

steps.title: Apply the exponential decay formula
steps.content:
With initial amount 6.32, we multiply by 0.965 for each of the 10 years:
$$6.32 \times (0.965)^{10}$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
